scope: Runtime user-facing API surface: HTTP/RPC protocols, built-in resources, CLI, config, events, error codes, wire JSON fields, tag grammars, MCP surface, and runtime enum/string contracts. Test files, internal logs, and implementation-only strings are excluded.

coverage.method: Curated defaults from API engine call sites and protocol constants.
coverage.known_residual: None in generated index; semantic behavior remains covered by guide pages.

coverage.method: AST scan of api/version.go VersionV* string constants.
coverage.known_residual: None.

coverage.method: AST scan of cobra.Command composites under cmd/vef-cli/cmd.
coverage.known_residual: None in scanned CLI package.

coverage.method: AST scan of String/Bool/Int flag helper families and MarkFlagRequired calls under cmd/vef-cli/cmd; unsupported flag definition helpers fail boundary verification.
coverage.known_residual: None for current Cobra flag definition calls.

coverage.method: AST scan of CRUD REST action constants.
coverage.known_residual: None.

coverage.method: AST scan of CRUD RPC action constants.
coverage.known_residual: None.

coverage.method: Source-derived REST/RPC/MCP endpoint constants and call-site evidence.
coverage.known_residual: None for framework-owned default endpoints.

coverage.method: AST scan of api/header.go Header* constants.
coverage.known_residual: None.

coverage.method: Curated source references for fundamental request/result fields shared by REST/RPC.
coverage.known_residual: None in generated index; JSON DTO fields are covered separately.

coverage.tier: Tier 2 scoped DTO AST with closed-world boundary check
coverage.method: AST scan of json tags on runtime DTO structs plus a boundary check over every non-test json-tagged struct field.
coverage.known_residual: None for current non-test source; new json-tagged runtime fields must be indexed or explicitly excluded.

coverage.method: AST scan of the MCP Streamable HTTP endpoint constant.
coverage.known_residual: None.

coverage.method: Catalog of struct-tag keywords accepted by github.com/invopop/jsonschema v0.14.0, with boundary verification that fails on dependency-version drift and uncovered in-source jsonschema tags.
coverage.known_residual: None for the pinned jsonschema parser version.

coverage.method: AST scan of internal/mcp Prompt composites.
coverage.known_residual: None in scanned MCP package.

coverage.method: AST scan of internal/mcp Tool composites.
coverage.known_residual: None in scanned MCP package.

coverage.method: AST scan of the REST action validator's allowed HTTP verb set.
coverage.known_residual: None in current validator construction.

coverage.method: AST scan of FormKey* constants.
coverage.known_residual: None.

coverage.method: AST scan of api/auth.go AuthStrategy* string constants.
coverage.known_residual: None.

coverage.method: AST scan of internal/security AuthType* constants that are sent through Authentication.Type.
coverage.known_residual: None in known built-in authenticators.

coverage.method: AST scan of NewRPCResource/NewRESTResource calls in built-in runtime resource packages.
coverage.known_residual: None in scanned built-in resource directories.

coverage.method: AST scan of explicit OperationSpec values and CRUD builder defaults inside built-in runtime resource packages.
coverage.known_residual: None in scanned built-in resource directories.

coverage.method: AST extraction of Effective* accessors, ApplyDefaults assignments, monitor DefaultConfig values, and curated source references for defaults outside those named surfaces; boundary verification fails when a supported default surface is not indexed.
coverage.known_residual: Defaults outside Effective*/ApplyDefaults/DefaultConfig and curated reviewed call sites require explicit review.

coverage.method: AST scan of storage and datasource enum constants used in configuration values.
coverage.known_residual: None in current config enum files.

coverage.method: AST walk of config structs rooted at known vef.* config roots plus vef.data_sources.<name>; verifier fails if a config/ struct with config tags is unreachable.
coverage.known_residual: None for config/ structs with config tags.

coverage.method: AST scan of reserved configuration-name constants.
coverage.known_residual: None.

coverage.method: AST scan of Env* constants plus boundary checks for os.Getenv/os.LookupEnv call sites.
coverage.known_residual: None for string-literal or const-backed environment lookups.

coverage.method: AST scan of EventType*/eventType* constants, EventType() return values, and built-in subscription/route-inspection topic call sites.
coverage.known_residual: None for framework-owned non-test event topics.

coverage.method: AST/source-derived extraction of outbox DLQ headers, topic prefix, retry backoff, and persisted-error bounds.
coverage.known_residual: None for current built-in event transports.

coverage.method: AST scan of dynamic i18n.T call sites whose key source is another audited surface such as label_i18n tags, validator rules, or Fiber error mappings.
coverage.known_residual: None for current dynamic i18n.T call sites.

coverage.method: AST scan of literal or const-backed i18n.T calls, validator rule message keys, and label_i18n struct tags.
coverage.known_residual: None for literal or const-backed keys; dynamic sources are tracked as i18n key indirections.

coverage.method: Catalog of storage meta tag name, dive value, file-reference kinds, and attribute grammar delimiters.
coverage.known_residual: None for the current parser constants and tag parsing rules.

coverage.method: AST scan of the default mold tag name and restricted parser token constants, with boundary verification for parser token coverage.
coverage.known_residual: None for current mold parser token constants.

coverage.method: AST scan of built-in FieldTransformer Tag() methods.
coverage.known_residual: None for current built-in mold transformer Tag() methods.

coverage.method: AST scan of built-in Translator Supports(kind) prefix checks.
coverage.known_residual: None for current built-in translate kind prefixes.

coverage.method: AST scan of ErrCode* constants in api_errors.go and result/constants.go.
coverage.known_residual: None for named error-code constants.

coverage.method: AST scan of ErrMessage* constants.
coverage.known_residual: Inline i18n keys are covered by the i18n message key category.

coverage.method: AST scan of typed string constants in public packages plus runtime internal DTO/transport packages.
coverage.known_residual: Integer/stringer enum renderings are covered by the generated public API index and package contract ledger.

coverage.method: AST scan of search tag name, attributes, params, ignore marker, and operator/type tokens.
coverage.known_residual: None for constants in search/constants.go.

coverage.method: AST scan of tabular tag name, attributes, and ignore marker.
coverage.known_residual: None for constants in tabular/constants.go.

coverage.method: AST scan of validator struct-tag key constants used by Field.Tag.Get.
coverage.known_residual: None for current validator label tag lookups.

coverage.method: AST scan of built-in validator rule registration calls.
coverage.known_residual: None for current built-in validator registrations and ValidationRule composites.

entries.name: naming-master
details: Senior IT naming expert for code identifiers and database objects. Provides professional naming schemes following industry standards for multiple languages (Java, TypeScript, Go, Rust, Python) and databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite). Includes database design guidance on audit fields, indexes, constraints, and foreign key strategies.

entries.name: database_query
details: Execute a read-only (SELECT) parameterized SQL query against the database. Returns query results as JSON array.

details: EventConfig.Validate fallback when max_retries is unset
